title: Australian Fish Soup
description: A hearty and comforting soup originating from Australia, made with fresh fish and a creamy base.
instructions: Bring the stock to a boil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Reduce heat to medium-low and add the chopped onion, minced garlic, carrot, and celery. Simmer for 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Add the fish fillets to the pot and cook for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Remove the fish from the pot and flake it into bite-sized pieces.
Return the fish to the pot and stir in the fish sauce. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped parsley or chives if desired.
